name: Xactware XactAnalysis (Verisk) Property Claims API
what_it_does: Xactware XactAnalysis (Verisk) REST API for property insurance claims management and construction cost estimating. Enables AI agents to manage property damage estimate creation and review using Xactimate pricing for claims processing, handle claim assignment and adjuster workflow for desk and field adjusting, access construction material and labor cost database (XactPricelist) for accurate property restoration estimates, retrieve claim analytics and benchmarking data for claims portfolio management, manage supplement and revision workflow for estimate lifecycle management, handle contractor assignment and mitigation work authorization for restoration management, access photo and sketch data management for remote claims inspection, retrieve fraud detection and estimate integrity scoring for SIU support, manage large loss and catastrophe claim workflow for CAT event management, and integrate Xactimate estimate data with core insurance systems, TPA platforms, and contractor networks.
use_cases: Automating property estimate review from claims automation agents
Assigning adjusters from claims management agents
Analyzing claims performance from portfolio analytics agents
Managing CAT event claims from catastrophe response agents
not_for: Life and health insurance without P&C property claims context
Commercial construction without insurance restoration focus
best_when: A property insurer, TPA, or contractor network using Xactimate and XactAnalysis wants AI agents to automate claim assignment, estimate review, supplement management, and portfolio analytics.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Xactimate estimate automation affects claim settlements — automated estimate approval without adjuster review creates coverage disputes and financial exposure. XactPricelist pricing is regional and updated periodically; estimate accuracy depends on correct regional pricing selection. Xactware is owned by Verisk Analytics; Xactimate pricing data is proprietary and licensed — unauthorized use or redistribution creates IP licensing violations.

auth.notes: Xactware XactAnalysis uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. API access via Verisk developer program. Webhooks for claims events. REST API with JSON. South Jordan, Utah HQ (Xactware). Verisk Analytics subsidiary. Verisk acquired Xactware (2012). Public (VRSK NASDAQ). Xactimate is the dominant property claims estimating platform — 50%+ of US property claims use Xactimate pricing. 9,000+ carrier/contractor/TPA customers. Competes with Symbility (CoreLogic) for property claims estimating.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-estimate and annual subscription
pricing.notes: South Jordan, Utah. Xactware (Verisk VRSK NASDAQ). Verisk acquired Xactware 2012. Xactimate dominant US property claims estimating. 9,000+ customers. Competes with Symbility (CoreLogic) for property estimating. Strong in homeowners, commercial property, and contents claims.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Xactimate estimate automation affects property claim settlements; automated estimate approval without adjuster review creates coverage dispute and bad faith exposure
XactPricelist regional pricing — Xactimate pricing is region-specific and updated periodically; automated estimates must select correct region/pricelist version to ensure accuracy
Proprietary pricing data — Xactimate XactPricelist is Verisk/Xactware IP; automated extraction or redistribution of pricing data outside licensed use creates IP liability
CAT surge pricing — during catastrophe events, Xactware publishes CAT-specific pricelists; automated estimates during CAT events must use correct pricelist for accurate settlements
Supplement cycle management — Xactimate supplements require carrier-specific approval workflows; automated supplement submission must follow carrier supplement handling policies
Contractor network licensing — Xactimate contractor pricing levels (retail, contractor) differ; automated estimates must use the correct pricing tier for the restoration scenario
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property claims estimating. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/CA. Property claim and estimate data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property claims. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Claim and estimate data.
